action: Added `rare` subcommand to experiments/met_tail.py: picks one random singleton tag (reproducible with --seed) and prints the single artwork that carries it, with objectURL.
tests: rare --seed 42 on tate_stratified.jsonl: deterministic (tag 'trout' -> objectID 12338), verified twice
rare without seed: random singleton returned
rare on default fixture: works, 11/13 singletons reported
counts match tags --rare at scale: 2595 tags, 1345 singletons over 3458 records
next_suggested: Run 9: promote tool to repo root as longtail.py with DEFAULT_DATA=experiments/tate_stratified.jsonl, record rename in DECISIONS.md, rewrite README quickstart around `python3 longtail.py rare`.
